title: Pull-based GitOps (ArgoCD/Flux)
description: Master pull-based GitOps principles using tools like ArgoCD or Flux. Architect continuous delivery systems where the cluster reconciles its state to a Git-based source of truth.
objectives: Master pull-based GitOps principles using tools like ArgoCD or Flux.
Architect continuous delivery systems where the cluster reconciles its state to a Git-based source of truth.
